Document:
# Synthetics
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Synthetics"]
Pre-war robotic units still operational in the Wendover region. Player-controlled chassis with integrated armament. All synthetic roles require [bold][color=#cc3333]whitelist[/color][/bold].
## Chassis Overview
[bold][color=#a4885c]Chassis[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Role / Speed[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]HP[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Built-In Weapon[/color][/bold]
[bold]Mr. Handy[/bold]
Domestic (2.5/4.5)
200
Flamer (30 fuel)
[bold]Protectron[/bold]
Civil Service (2.0/3.5)
200
Hand-Laser (9 cap)
[bold]Protectron Police[/bold]
Law Enforcement (2.0/3.5)
200
Electro-Shock (10 blunt + 12 shock)
[bold]Protectron Builder[/bold]
Engineering (2.0/3.5)
200
RCD + construction tools
[bold]Protectron Firefighter[/bold]
Emergency (2.0/3.5)
200
Cryo Emitter (6 cap)
[bold]Mr. Gutsy[/bold]
Military (2.5/4.5)
200
Plasma Caster (15 cap)
[bold]Assaultron[/bold]
Combat (3.0/6.0)
200
Head Laser (charged) + Claw (30 slash)
[bold]Assaultron Tesla[/bold]
Combat (3.0/6.0)
200
Tesla Discharge (chain-lightning)
[bold][color=#cc3333]Sentry Bot Minigun[/color][/bold]
Heavy Siege (1.0/1.5)
[color=#cc3333]350[/color]
5mm Gatling (30 cap) + 0.65x armor + 50% reflect
[bold][color=#cc3333]Sentry Bot Laser[/color][/bold]
Heavy Siege (1.0/1.5)
[color=#cc3333]350[/color]
Gatling Laser (20 cap) + 0.65x armor + 50% reflect
[bold]Robobrain[/bold]
Medical/Utility (1.5/3.0)
200
None (medical tools)
[bold]Robobrain Laser[/bold]
Medical/Combat (1.5/3.0)
200
Hand-Laser (9 cap)
Sentry Bots are [bold]2.0x scale[/bold]. All others are 1.0x.
## Jobs
[bold][color=#a4885c]Job[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Chassis Options[/color][/bold]
Mr. Handy
Mr. Handy (3-handed)
Protectron
Standard, Police, Builder, Firefighter
Mr. Gutsy
Mr. Gutsy (military)
Assaultron
Standard, Tesla (fastest chassis)
Sentry Bot
Minigun, Laser (heaviest chassis)
Robobrain
Standard, Laser (medical focus)
## Borg Modules
[bold]Integrated Hand-Laser[/bold] — Semi-auto laser, 9 capacity, rechargeable
[bold]Plasma Caster[/bold] — Plasma projector, internal battery, self-recharging
[bold]Integrated Flamer[/bold] — Full-auto incendiary, 30 fuel, auto-refill
[bold]Cryo Emitter[/bold] — Cryo projector, 6 capacity, fire suppression
[bold]Security Module[/bold] — Stun baton, handcuffs, flashlight
[bold]Diagnosis Module[/bold] — Medical scanner and patient assessment
[bold]Treatment Module[/bold] — Surgical tools, healing capability
[bold]Tool Module[/bold] — Wrench, screwdriver, welder
[bold]GPS Module[/bold] — Navigation and mapping (Wendover tactical map)
## Hostile NPC Robots
[bold][color=#a4885c]Robot[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]HP[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Armament[/color][/bold]
Protectron (Melee)
100
Melee (5 brute), slow patrol
Protectron Police
100
Hand-Laser (9 cap)
Mr. Handy (variants)
100
Claw / Saw / Hand-Laser
Mr. Gutsy
100
Plasma Caster (9 cap)
Assaultron
200
Claw (15 slash), fast (3.0/6.0)
Eyebot
100
Hand-Laser (9 cap), plays ambient music
Robobrain
100
Hand-Laser (9 cap)
[color=#cc3333]Sentry Bot (Gatling)[/color]
[color=#cc3333]350[/color]
Gatling Laser + Stomp (40 brute). [color=#cc3333]8-second death explosion.[/color]
[color=#cc3333]Sentry Bot (Ballistic)[/color]
[color=#cc3333]350[/color]
Missile Launcher. [color=#cc3333]8-second death explosion.[/color]
